module.name: require-readonly-props
module.description: Require readonly typing for JSX component props.

scenarios.name: should allow a props interface where all properties are readonly
scenarios.given: interface IProps { readonly name: string; readonly age: number }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the props interface used by a JSX component

scenarios.name: should allow a non-JSX interface without readonly requirements
scenarios.given: interface IConfig { timeout: number } used with no JSX component

scenarios.name: should report a props interface property missing the readonly modifier
scenarios.given: interface IProps { name: string } passed to a React component
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the props interface
scenarios.then: a requireReadonlyProps violation is reported on the mutable property
